notes.beauty: Cycles beauty render under HDRI lighting, transparent film enabled.
notes.albedo: Emission override using material base color / base color texture. Intended as lighting-independent diffuse color approximation.
notes.mask: Render layer alpha with transparent film. White foreground, black background.
notes.normal_world_debug: Blender default normal pass. World-space debug only. Do not use for renderer training.
notes.normal_camera: Camera-space normal remapped from [-1,1] to [0,1]. Use rgb * 2 - 1 when loading into torch.
notes.normal_contract: Expected downstream tensor: [3,H,W], float32, camera-space, unit vectors, +Z toward camera if convention check passes.
